prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: JavaFX 2D game spritesheet
Primary request: original shrine-fantasy danmaku player character, red and white shrine guardian, small readable flying sprite, NOT Touhou, NOT fan art, no existing copyrighted character.
Composition: one horizontal row of exactly 4 equal animation frames on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background; each frame shows the same character hovering/flying with subtle sleeve and ribbon motion; generous padding; no scenery; no labels; no UI.
Style/medium: pixel-art inspired production spritesheet, crisp clusters, restrained palette, readable at 64x64.
Constraints: background must be uniform #00ff00 with no shadows, gradients, texture, floor plane, or lighting variation; do not use #00ff00 in the character; no text, no watermark.
composition: horizontal four-frame spritesheet on chroma-key background
constraints: original character only; no Touhou or fan art; no text; no watermark; no scenery; flat #00ff00 background

prompt:

Asset type: JavaFX 2D game boss spritesheet

Composition: one horizontal row of exactly 6 equal animation frames on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background; same character, same facing direction; frames show idle-to-spellcasting motion with sleeves, crescent ornaments, and hair moving; no scenery; no labels; no UI.

prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: JavaFX vertical shooter stage background
Primary request: original moonlit shrine approach background for a 2D danmaku game first stage: dark blue night sky, crescent moon, distant shrine gate silhouette, stone path, floating paper charms, soft lantern light. NOT Touhou, no existing franchise locations.
Composition: vertical game background, clear central play area, no characters, no UI, no text, no watermark; designed to crop into a 620x652 playfield.
Style/medium: painterly pixel-art inspired background with readable shapes and restrained contrast so bullets remain visible.
Lighting/mood: cool moonlight with small warm lantern accents.
Constraints: no text, no logos, no characters, no fan art.
composition: vertical shooter background with clear central play area
constraints: original location only; no text; no watermark; no characters
